info.title: jira-oauth-cli
info.description: Command line tool to setup OAuth on a JIRA server so that it can be used with the Atlassian.NET SDK.

options.name: --key
options.description:
Required. The Consumer Key as defined in the OAuth incoming
authentication section of the application link in JIRA.

options.name: --secret
options.description:
Required. The Private Key that was used to generate the
public key defiend in the OAuth incoming authentication
section of the application link in JIRA.

options.name: --url
options.description: Required. (Default: true) Url to the JIRA server.

options.name: --username
options.description:
Required. The username of the user to get the OAuth tokens
for.

options.name: --password
options.description: Required. The password of the user.

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Guides you through the steps of setting up OAuth in Jira.

options.name: --key
options.description:
Required. The Consumer Key as defined in the OAuth incoming
authentication section of the application link in JIRA.

options.name: --url
options.description: Required. (Default: true) Url to the JIRA server.

options.name: --username
options.description:
Required. The username of the user to get the OAuth tokens
for.

options.name: --password
options.description: Required. The password of the user.
